learning.concept: Input is the data given to a computer.
learning.explanation: You use hardware like a keyboard, mouse, or microphone to provide input to a program.

analogy.title: Restaurant Orders
analogy.body:
Giving an order in a restaurant is an input to the kitchen staff.

👉 Waiter (Input device) sends your order (Data) to the Chef (Processor).

practice.a: Typing a message to a friend.
Speaking to Siri or Google Assistant.
Inserting card and typing your secret PIN.
